name: getyourguide-mcp
description: GetYourGuide tours and activities for Claude — search, details, options, and reviews

gyg_api_key.title: GetYourGuide Partner API key
gyg_api_key.description: Sent as the X-ACCESS-TOKEN header on every request. Get one by joining the GetYourGuide partner program at partner.getyourguide.com.

gyg_currency.title: Default currency
gyg_currency.description: ISO 4217 currency for prices (e.g. USD, EUR). Optional — individual tool calls can override it.

gyg_language.title: Default language
gyg_language.description: Content language (e.g. en, de). Optional — individual tool calls can override it.

tools.name: gyg_search_tours
tools.description: Search GetYourGuide tours and activities by free text, location, category, or date range

tools.name: gyg_get_tour
tools.description: Get full details for one tour by ID

tools.name: gyg_get_tour_options
tools.description: List the bookable options of a tour

tools.name: gyg_get_tour_reviews
tools.description: List customer reviews for a tour

tools.name: gyg_get_location
tools.description: Get details for a location (city, POI, region) by ID

tools.name: gyg_list_location_tours
tools.description: List tours available at a location
